title: From Homeless to Boss: Greg's Amazing Journey
summary: Greg Daily was a homeless teenager who slept on friends' sofas and kitchen floors because he had no money for rent. He learned about business from his grandfather, who sold brooms from a van. Now, Greg is 43 years old and runs a successful company called Science in Advertising. His company helps other businesses with online ads on Google and Facebook. Greg's life changed when he met his wife and went back to college to get a better job. This story shows that even when things are tough, you can work hard and achieve your dreams.

options: To learn more and earn more money
questions.correct_answer: To learn more and earn more money

background_read: This story is about Greg Daily, who faced homelessness as a teenager but became a successful business owner. Homelessness means not having a safe place to live, and it can happen to anyone. Greg's journey shows how learning from family, meeting supportive people, and getting an education can help overcome challenges. It teaches us about resilience and the importance of hard work in achieving goals.
Article_Structure: WHO: Greg Daily, a man who was homeless as a teenager and now runs a company.
WHAT: He went from sleeping on sofas to starting Science in Advertising, which helps businesses with online ads.
WHERE: He lived in Minneapolis and Denver, and his company is based in Denver.
WHY: To show that people can overcome tough times through hard work and support.

perspectives.description: Greg's story highlights how facing homelessness didn't stop him from succeeding.
